enchantment.loreexpansion.ambush.desc: Attacks from behind and attacks on mobs that are not actively targeting you deal increased damage.
enchantment.loreexpansion.busy_bee.desc: Grants a chance for a bee to spawn after defeating a mob, with up to 3 bees joining your side.
enchantment.loreexpansion.chains.desc: Has a 30% chance to chain a cluster of mobs together and keep them bound for a short time.
enchantment.loreexpansion.committed.desc: Deal increased damage against already wounded enemies.
enchantment.loreexpansion.critical_hit.d: Gives you a chance to inflict critical hits dealing triple damage.
enchantment.loreexpansion.leeching.desc: Defeating a mob heals you a small portion of the mob's max health.
enchantment.loreexpansion.radiance.desc: Has a 20% chance to spawn a circular area that heals you and all allies within the area.
Has a 50% chance to spawn a circular area that heals you and all allies within the area.
loreexpansion.configuration.title: Lore Expansion Configs
